name: GLM-4-9B-Chat
license: GLM-4 License (custom, free for research & most commercial use)
note: Open 9B GLM-4 checkpoint (co-developed by Zhipu AI/THUDM Tsinghua) beating Llama-3-8B on semantics/math/code/reasoning; 26 languages, 128K context (separate 1M variant exists).

results.notes: Berkeley Function-Calling Leaderboard overall accuracy, from official model card's Function Calling table (AST 80.26, Exec 84.40, Relevance 87.92).
MT-Bench score from official model card's main evaluation table.
LogicKor official leaderboard, model_id THUDM/glm-4-9b-chat, default prompt strategy

MGSM (Multilingual Grade School Math) score from the official model card's 'Multi Language' benchmark table (11 languages: zh, en, bn, de, es, fr, ja, ru, sw, te, th), also confirmed verbatim in the GitHub README_20240605.md. Not previously tracked -- corpus only had the English-only GSM8K score for this model.

XWinograd score from the official model card's 'Multi Language' benchmark table (6 languages: zh, en, fr, jp, ru, pt), confirmed verbatim in GitHub README_20240605.md. Genuinely new benchmark slug for this model -- not a duplicate of any existing entry.

M-MMLU (multilingual MMLU, 'all languages') score from the official model card's 'Multi Language' benchmark table, confirmed verbatim in GitHub README_20240605.md. Mapped to the 'mmmlu' taxonomy slug consistent with how other corpus entries (e.g. Phi-4-mini) use that slug for multilingual-MMLU results rather than exclusively OpenAI's MMMLU set.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real. Release date 2024-06-05 verified via GitHub zai-org/GLM-4 file literally named README_20240605.md. HF safetensors metadata shows 9,399,951,392 params (9.4B, rounds to 9 — matches). config.json seq_length=131072 confirms 128K context. License tag is 'license:other' (custom GLM-4 license) — matches. All 6 result rows (MMLU 72.4, GSM8K 79.6, MATH 50.6, HumanEval 71.8, IFEval 69.0, C-Eval 75.6) re-confirmed verbatim on the HF README. No changes made.
